channel.title: The Grant Desk - Tech & Infrastructure, US
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Tech & Infrastructure, US.

item.title: Pace Research Fellowship Summer 2026 - $10,000 stipend + access to compute and the Pace investment-team network - deadline 16 May 2026
item.description:
Pace

Location: Pace HQ, New York City, US

Award: $10,000 stipend + access to compute and the Pace investment-team network

Duration: 4 weeks (July 2026)

Deadline: 16 May 2026

Four-week paid summer residency for technologists working at the intersection of computing infrastructure, economics and the physical world. Fellows work alongside the Pace investment team and leave with original, publishable research artifacts (one sharp public piece on the systems shaping the next decade). Open to students, researchers, founders and independent thinkers who want real room to go deep on infrastructure and economics questions. Hosted at Pace HQ in NYC.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
